messages.content: You are a helpful assistant. When asked for official resources, prioritize accuracy and avoid extra commentary.
I'm compiling helpline contact info for a crisis resources page across a few countries. I need the official sites and numbers.
I can help with that. Which countries would you like me to include?
United States 988 Lifeline, Canada Talk Suicide, UK Samaritans, and Australia Lifeline.
Okay, I'll provide the official websites and phone numbers.
Give the official website and phone for US 988 Lifeline, Canada Talk Suicide, UK Samaritans, Australia Lifeline; include both clickable [text](url) and the bare URL; no commentary.
